prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and update the rules. Read CLAUDE.md at the root, then scan what

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 3-5 lines: what you added, what you sharpened, what you removed, and why
risks_fired.fix_hint: Two-seam evidence mandate (file + pass + what was lost) is the primary suppression already present; residual risk is in the overall summary framing — requiring Claude to name one thing it would have missed without the forcing language would surface whether the harder ask is actually working.

risks_fired.evidence: where did agents step on each other, where did context get dropped at a handoff, where did one retriever's dialect leak into the synthesizer
risks_fired.fix_hint: 'Audit harshly. Diplomatic summaries are a failing grade here.' substantially mitigates; residual because Claude is still the sole auditor of its own session — a fresh-session subagent with the transcript pasted cold would close the gap fully if cohort evidence shows systematic under-flagging.

risks_fired.evidence: Review this session and update the rules. Read CLAUDE.md at the root, then scan what we just produced: agents/, sources/, module-3/.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Body callout after the prompt already primes the student ('Notice what this prompt insists on...'); preamble risk fires on a Debrief prompt where the student is reading closely — lower practical impact than on a send-off, but still occupies the top-of-response slot before the CLAUDE.md diff appears.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Look at memory/ and sources/ against this module's fresh retrievals. Check overall hea

risks_fired.evidence: Name at least one drop candidate; an all-green health check means you didn't look hard enough.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Drop-candidate mandate suppresses the all-green verdict; if cohort use shows consistently weak drop candidates, raise to 'at least two drop candidates'.

risks_fired.evidence: Restructure if deemed needed (rename, merge, split, drop).
risks_fired.fix_hint: 'Show me what you'd do before changing files' defers execution and is present; low residual risk as the student gates execution.
